title: About Me
description: I’m Valerio, an Engineering Manager based in Zurich with a strong background in software development and product engineering. Over the years I’ve worked across companies of different sizes, from large enterprises to fast-moving startups, building digital products in domains such as e-commerce, fintech, and IoT. I enjoy operating at the intersection of technology, product, and business, helping teams deliver meaningful user experiences at scale.
description2: My focus is on building high-performing teams and creating an environment where engineers can grow and do their best work. I care deeply about clean architecture, pragmatic technical decisions, and strong collaboration across disciplines. While I’ve moved into leadership, I still stay close to the code and the product, bringing a hands-on approach when needed.
description3: Outside of work, you’ll most likely find me in the mountains - skiing, climbing, or hiking. I also enjoy cooking (very Italian, I know), traveling, and photography. I’m naturally curious and always looking for new places to explore and new things to learn.
